spec_match.rationale: Directly tests the native behavior of fit-content() in a block layout, demonstrating it behaves as min(max-content, max(min-content, cap)) natively.

interactive.rationale: Interactive text area changes the tooltips content dynamically, and a slider modifies the maximum cap dynamically with live pixel measurements.

edge_cases.rationale: Contrasts short labels against long paragraphs with live layout measurements.

design_system.rationale: Very solid theme compliance, nice dark tooltip labels, and crisp comparison matrix tables.

summary: A superb interactive Tooltip Builder comparing fit-content sizing against max-content and max-width layout strategies with real-time DOM pixel measurements.
